mapper.select: select d.name as type, count(e.id) as value from department d left join employee e on e.departmentID = d.id group by d.id, d.name order by value desc, d.name asc

select substring(a.date, 1, 7) as month, count(case when a.checkOnTime is not null then 1 end) as value from check1 a where substring(a.date, 1, 7) between #{startMonth} and #{endMonth} group by substring(a.date, 1, 7) order by month asc

select substring(a.date, 1, 7) as month, sum(case when a.checkOnStatus = '迟到' then 1 else 0 end) as lateValue, sum(case when a.checkOffStatus = '早退' then 1 else 0 end) as earlyValue from check1 a where substring(a.date, 1, 7) between #{startMonth} and #{endMonth} group by substring(a.date, 1, 7) order by month asc

select lt.name as type, sum(cast(ifnull(a.duration, '0') as decimal(12, 2))) as value from leave1 a left join leavetype lt on a.typeID = lt.id where a.status = '1' and date_format(a.applyTime, '%Y-%m') between #{startMonth} and #{endMonth} group by lt.id, lt.name order by value desc, lt.name asc

select date_format(a.applyTime, '%Y-%m') as month, sum(ifnull(a.price, 0)) as value from fixedassets a where a.status = '1' and date_format(a.applyTime, '%Y-%m') between #{startMonth} and #{endMonth} group by date_format(a.applyTime, '%Y-%m') order by month asc
select a.month as month, sum(ifnull(a.salary, 0)) as value from salary a where a.month between #{startMonth} and #{endMonth} group by a.month order by month asc
